asset_type: TaraHome technical blog cover, landscape editorial photograph
prompt: A homeowner safely moves a Home Assistant smart-home backup to replacement hardware in a warm, lived-in residential utility nook. Show one human hand placing a compact unbranded portable solid-state backup drive beside a newer compact unbranded mini computer, while the older compact mini computer remains powered down nearby and ordinary lamps still glow softly in the home beyond. Use clean photorealistic editorial home-technology photography, believable consumer hardware and cable placement, real material grain, warm late-afternoon window light, natural oak, charcoal electronics, and restrained dark forest-green accents. Keep the hand, backup drive, and replacement computer centered for both 16:10 article and 16:9 card crops. No visible brand logos, product labels, text, watermark, screens, interfaces, QR codes, embedded headline, charts, graphs, decorative routing or network path lines, glowing trails, translucent panels, inset frames, floating UI cards, progress bars, futuristic laboratory, repeated beige diagram, invented smart-home product shapes, impossible cables, extra fingers, or clutter.
